steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says Arca 'incorporates Latin rhythms into the hyperpop sound.' The word Yet signals she is an exception to the typical hyperpop model — but she is still working within hyperpop, not departing from it entirely. The correct statement must reflect that she modifies the sound without abandoning it.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'While some of her recordings conform to the model perfected by Laura Les, others reject it outright.': the passage never says any of her recordings reject the hyperpop model outright — only that she adds Latin rhythms to it. ✗
  • Choice B — 'She developed her unique sound without being influenced by other artists on Spotify's hyperpop playlist.': the passage makes no claim about what influenced her sound. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Her music diverges from the typical hyperpop sound but doesn't abandon it.': matches exactly — she incorporates Latin rhythms (diverges) into the hyperpop sound (doesn't abandon it). ✓
  • Choice D — 'Her inclusion on Spotify's hyperpop playlist inspired established artists to embrace stylistic experimentation.': reverses the causal relationship; the passage says Spotify encourages diversity, not that Arca inspired other artists. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
